category_sources: source_facts.description says Very capable calculator; official SourceForge project categorizes Wcalc under Mathematics, Calculators, and Scientific Calculators.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project page uses the Wcalc display name; source_facts.name is w-calc.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project page is the best available official documentation surface and summarizes features, categories, files, support, and code links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project page exposes a Code/SVN archive for the project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies calculator function; official SourceForge project describes arbitrary-precision calculator features and command-line interface.
